hero.title: Building with purpose, leading with action.
hero.intro: I am Victoria Nguyen. I turn ideas into practical impact through hands-on work, leadership, and continuous growth.

bullets: Owned full B2B sales cycle from prospecting to close, securing partnerships with L'Oreal, Amazon, and Pfizer projected to impact 1,500+ students globally.
Managed brand accounts and high-volume LinkedIn/email outreach to drive account growth and quarterly business targets.
Explored AI-agent workflows for research, lead qualification, and outreach automation to scale outbound efficiency.

jobs.company: VCU Office of Innovation & Strategic Design
jobs.meta: Innovation & Strategic Design Fellow | Richmond, VA | Sept 2025 - Current
bullets: Selected as an inaugural Da Vinci Center Fellow and helped build the foundation for a new innovation-to-industry fellowship model.
Led business development and digital outreach to support partnerships with Fortune 500 companies including L'Oreal, Keefe, and Wells Fargo.
Coordinated Design Jams and recruitment for interdisciplinary projects with VCU leadership, the Virginia Department of Accounts, and the Governor's Office of Transformation.

jobs.meta: Omnichannel Education & Sales Intern | New York City, NY | June 2025 - August 2025
bullets: Delivered competitive intelligence across 20+ beauty competitors to inform C-suite education strategy and national rollout decisions.
Managed accounts and vendor relationships, processing 600+ Salesforce transactions with 100% accuracy.
Built a DEI business case showing an 86% increase in customer engagement and recommending expansion to underserved NYC segments.

jobs.meta: Senior Associate Marketing Intern | Dallas, TX | May 2024 - August 2024
bullets: Developed KPI-based campaign recommendations using risk and financial analysis to improve ROI and optimize budget allocation.
Created and produced a monthly Mid Markets newsletter to highlight updates, events, and CSR initiatives for internal engagement.
Synthesized campaign insights into stakeholder-ready recommendations to support marketing planning and execution.

items.name: Alpha Kappa Psi Fraternity
items.meta: Executive President | Richmond, VA | May 2025 - Current
bullets: Lead a 68-member professional business fraternity chapter and direct a 7-member executive board across operations, recruitment, alumni relations, and strategy.
Manage a $10,000 annual budget across professional development and philanthropy priorities.
Implemented recruitment initiatives that improved chapter recruitment outcomes by 40%.

items.name: Student Managed Investment Portfolio (SMIP)
items.meta: Investment Analyst | Richmond, VA | March 2024 - Current
bullets: Perform company and sector analysis on Consumer Staples firms using Bloomberg and IBISWorld to inform decisions for a $415K portfolio.
Collaborate with a 40-analyst team to assess market conditions and identify opportunities.
Support weekly buy/sell pitch development with research-backed recommendations.

gapYear.title: Gap Year Journey
highlights: Traveled and gained global perspective through immersive cultural experiences.
Strengthened professional skills through networking, hands-on projects, and independent learning.
Built clarity around long-term goals by combining personal growth with career-focused action.
